name: @forgeax/hello-skin
description: Khronos Fox.glb 3-instance skeletal animation demo (tweak-20260611-skin-fox-3clip-and-kb-sample-assets). createApp + configurePackIndex + loadByGuid<SceneAsset>(Fox) + assets.instantiate * 3 with three independent AnimationPlayers driving Survey / Walk / Run clips. End-to-end pluginPack production path -- bridge emits Skin component, gltfImporter emits skeleton/skin/animation-clip POD, postSpawnResolveJoints fills Skin.joints from the spawn subtree.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle shape downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-gltf sizes already tracked at package level

fps.reason: hello-triangle baseline anchor only; hello-skin smoke covers 300-frame skinned draw path (AC-35)

bench.reason: convergence integration app; bench focus on @forgeax/engine-math + @forgeax/engine-ecs

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; skin pipeline ships per-feature with bundle-size locked at package level
